evals.name: create-pr-with-commits
evals.description: Verifies that delivery handles create-pr-with-commits and produces the expected role-specific artifact.
evals.prompt: 代码已完成，创建 PR 并关联 Issue #123
evals.expected_output: 分支创建 + 提交 + PR 创建 + CI 检查

assertions.text: 创建符合项目命名规范的功能分支
commit message 遵循 Conventional Commits 或项目规范
PR 包含摘要、PM 文档引用、测试状态
创建 PR 后检查 CI 运行状态
